title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at InfraMantra

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at InfraMantra
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!
